headlines.title: One of Texas' Oldest Oil Plays Is Running Dry
headlines.summary: The Eagle Ford shale play has shown remarkably consistent crude oil production and rising natural gas output in recent years. headlines.title: Turkey Pushes Bold Global Plan to Electrify 35% of Energy Use by 2035
